Ar kapteini Valteru kopā dienējis sporta rotā, kopš tā laika tā ir stipra draudzība gan jūrā, gan uz zemes Rūdolfs Romans - komandas kapteiņa dēls, diplomēts būvinženieris, sertificēts būvuzraugs. Profesionāli nodarbojies ar hokeju, ir bijis Latvijas junioru čempions golfā U12 vecumā. Šobrīd paralēli darbam ir jahtu apmērīšanas sistēmas mērītājs Latvijā, strādājis par tiesnesi Eiropas un pasaules čempionātos jūras jahtām.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: Kultūršoks
programme.desc: Kultūra ir ne vien māksla, bet arī nauda, projekti, ražošana un gan radoši, gan postoši konflikti. Par kultūrvides problēmām un šokējošām atklāsmēm — raidījums "Kultūršoks".

programme.title: Krustpunktā
programme.desc: Visvairāk klausītais Latvijas radio raidījums "Krustpunktā" redzams arī Latvijas televīzijas ēterā. Ne tiešraidē, bet ar nelielu nobīdi, iespējams sekot līdzi gan aktuālajām intervijām, gan klausītāju uzdotajiem jautājumiem un amatpersonu atbildēm.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā runāsim par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi pazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Čehija – Itālija
programme.desc: Vēl viena spēle, kurā čehiem vajadzētu uzvarēt Itāliju. Abas komandas līdz šim pasaules čempionātos savstarpējās spēlēs tikušās deviņas reizes, un vienmēr uzvarējuši čehi. Lielākā sagrāve Itālijai bijusi ar 0 pret 11, bijis arī 0 pret 8 un 2 pret 9. Visspraigākā cīņa bija pirms 12 gadiem, kad Čehija uzvarēja ar 2 pret 0.

programme.title: Slepkavība Lerensu salās
programme.desc: Producentu Kristofu Bomonu atrod mirušu Lerensu salās, filmēšanas laukumā, kurā uzņem filmu, kas balstīta uz leģendu par cilvēku dzelzs maskā. Izmeklēšanas vadītāja Lora Kastaldi nozieguma vietā pārsteigta sastop savu māsu Manonu, kura nupat ir pārcelta uz Kannu brigādi. Viņas nav redzējušās kopš brīža, kad Lora neieradās uz mātes bērēm. Producenta slepkavības izmeklēšanā māsas atklāj aizdomās turamos, kas, šķiet, saistīti ar leģendu par cilvēku dzelzs maskā un viņam piedēvētajām dažādajām identitātēm.

programme.title: Eiropa fokusā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: Ceturtā studija
programme.desc: Raidījuma "4. studija" misija ir palīdzēt risināt sabiedrībai aktuālus ikdienas jautājumus visās dzīves sfērās, kas ietekmē katra indivīda un sabiedrības dzīves kvalitāti. Raidījuma misija formulēta sauklī "Neērti jautājumi ērtākai ikdienai". Raidījums aktualizē problēmas, ar kurām saskaras ikviens Latvijas iedzīvotājs, sākot ar ģimeni, mācību un darba vidi, publisko telpu un beidzot ar dažādu privāto, pašvaldību un valsts iestāžu darbību un to sniegtajiem pakalpojumiem.

programme.title: Pie stūres
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Rīta Panorāma
programme.desc: Enerģisks un iedvesmojošs sākums jaunai dienai! Ieskats gaidāmās dienas notikumos Latvijā un pasaulē, kultūras, izklaides un sporta ziņas, laika prognoze. Arī atskats uz aizvadītās dienas notikumiem, pievēršot uzmanību to attīstībai nakts laikā. Aizrautīgas sarunas ar viesiem un skanīgi muzikālie priekšnesumi. Raidījumu vada Gusts Kikusts, Sigurds Siliņš, Karīna Rubene, Danuta Juste, sporta ziņas lasa Reinis Ošenieks, Raimonds Gekišs, laika ziņas – Ilze Skudra, Ilze Golubeva, Toms Bricis.

programme.title: Šodienas jautājums
programme.desc: No pirmdienas līdz ceturtdienai 20:35 LTV1 demonstrē diskusiju raidījumu "Šodienas jautājums", kurā tiek analizēts un skaidrots kāds no attiecīgās dienas svarīgākajiem notikumiem. Koncentrēti, neieslīgstot liekvārdībā, raidījuma dalībnieki runā tiešām par būtiskāko! Operatīvi reaģējot uz aktuālajiem dienas notikumiem, studijā tiešraidē tiekas dažādu jomu eksperti un politiķi.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Zviedrija – Slovēnija
programme.desc: Diezin vai slovēņi spēs līdzīgi spēkoties ar zviedriem. Šādās cīņās favorītiem galvenais ir ātri gūt pirmos vārtus un pēc tam panākt jau lielāku pārsvaru. Ja tas izdodas, problēmu parasti nav, bet, ja pretinieki spēj nosargāt savus vārtus visai ilgi, tad cīņa var kļūt negaidīti spraiga. Te gan ir tāda nianse, ka parasti vājākā komanda ātrumā netiek līdzi un tai ir vairāk noraidījumu, kas, savukārt, rada lieliskas iespējas vairākumā gūt vārtus favorītiem.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā runāsim par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi pazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas.

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu
programme.desc: Šoreiz Bens atkal dodas uz Safolku pie Villa Lorda, īsta britu alu cilvēka. Bens atklāj, kā attīstījies Villa aizvēsturiskais piedzīvojums kopš Bena pēdējās viesošanās. Bens arī noskaidro, ko Villa tuvinieki domā par viņa aizraušanos un dzīvesveidu. Bens priecājas, ka Vills joprojām ar aizrautību māca citiem akmens laikmeta prasmes un kaļ jaunus nākotnes plānus.

programme.title: Ceturtā studija
programme.desc: Raidījuma "4. studija" misija ir palīdzēt risināt sabiedrībai aktuālus ikdienas jautājumus visās dzīves sfērās, kas ietekmē katra indivīda un sabiedrības dzīves kvalitāti. Raidījuma misija formulēta sauklī "Neērti jautājumi ērtākai ikdienai". Raidījums aktualizē problēmas, ar kurām saskaras ikviens Latvijas iedzīvotājs, sākot ar ģimeni, mācību un darba vidi, publisko telpu un beidzot ar dažādu privāto, pašvaldību un valsts iestāžu darbību un to sniegtajiem pakalpojumiem.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Alpu dakteris
programme.desc: Nav labākas vietas, kur patverties no pilsētas kņadas, trokšņa un stresa, kā kalni. Bet dzīvot tur? Dzimto Alpu mazpilsētiņu, saucot tās gaisotni par smacējošu un aprobežotu, Mārtins pameta jau pirms daudziem gadiem, lai kļūtu par veiksmīgu ārstu kosmopolītiskajā lielpilsētā Ņujorkā. Nu viņš ir atgriezies. Uz pavisam īsu apciemojumu, lai atkal drīz atvadītos. Taču no likteņa neizbēgsi - atgriešanās mājās izrādās uz palikšanu. Jo pārāk liels ir trieciens, uzzinot, ka viņa pirmā mīlestība, kas pēc Mārtina aizbraukšanas apprecēja viņa paša brāli Hansu, ir mirusi. Taču atstājusi meitu, par kuras esamību Mārtins nekad pat nebija zinājis! Ar to izrādās pietiekami, lai izlemtu palikt Pēkšņi kļuvis par tēvu, Mārtins vēlas uzzināt vairāk par savu jauniegūto meitu Lili, iemantot viņas uzticēšanos. Tā dēļ viņš ir gatavs pat mēģināt sadarboties ar savu jaunāko brāli Hansu, kas joprojām jūt aizvainojumu. Hanss ir kļuvis par glābēju komandas vadītāju, un kopā ar Mārtinu viņi turpmāk neskaitāmas reizes riskēs ar savu dzīvību, lai glābtu kalnu negadījumu upurus vai kāpējus, ko pārsteigusi pēkšņa vētra. Mārtinu gaida atklāsme, ka bez saknēm nav iespējas turpināt dzīvi. Šeit viņš pilnībā aptvers arī to, ka būt par ārstu kalnos - tā nav tikai profesija, bet gan aicinājums. Kļūt par labu neatliekamās medicīniskās palīdzības sniedzēju kalnos iemācīties nevar, par tādu piedzimst. Un Mārtins Grūbers tāds neapšaubāmi ir!

programme.title: 1:1. Aktuālā intervija
programme.desc: Raidījumā "1:1" [viens pret vienu] satiekas sabiedrībā zināma personība un žurnālists. Raidījums skaidro, analizē un ļauj izprast sabiedrībai nozīmīgas norises visdažādākajās dzīves jomās Latvijā un pasaulē, izprast personības nozīmīgumu, atbildību šo procesu virzībā. Viesi izvēlēti, ņemot vērā tā brīža aktualitātes vai arī konkrētās personas iespējamo ietekmi uz notikumiem nākotnē, – valsts pirmās amatpersonas, biznesa, kultūras un nevalstiskā sektora pārstāvji. Raidījumu vada žurnālists Gundars Rēders.

programme.title: Montija Dona britu dārzi
programme.desc: Montija Dona ceļojums pa Lielbritāniju turpinās. Šajā raidījumā viņš ceļo pa visblīvāk apdzīvotajām valsts vietām - Londonu un apkārtējām grāfistēm. Londonā Montijs apciemo īpašu dārzu uz baržas. Viņš arī ciemojas vietā, kur ir izaudzis un ar kuru viņam saistās sirsnīgas atmiņas. Montijs apmeklē dārzu, kurš bija ļoti aizaudzis un nolaists un kuru atjaunoja slavena popzvaigzne. Montijs dodas arī pie figurāli izcirpto krūmu meistares, kura savās kāzās lūdza viņai dāvināt bukšu un īvju stādus.

programme.title: Projekts Nākotne
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Studija
programme.desc: Latvijai būs kārtējā spēle pasaules čempionātā, un tā - pret ļoti spēcīgo Somijas komandu. Pirms spēles būs aktuālā hokeja studija kopā ar ekspertiem. Būs iepriekšējo spēļu novērtējums (arī pretinieku), prognozes pirms gaidāmās cīņas, tāpat intervijas ar spēlētājiem un treneriem. Būs interesanti - Latvijas un Somijas hokeja federācijām ir ļoti labas savstarpējās attiecības, nolemts kopā pretendēt uz 2030. gada pasaules čempionāta rīkošanu, taču laukumā nekādas dāvanas netiks pasniegtas.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Latvija – Somija
programme.desc: Pretinieki Latvijai ir labi zināmi, taču Somijas hokejs ir ļoti augstā līmenī, par ko liecina valstsvienības sasniegumi pēdējos gados. Somiem gan neveicās pērn, taču no 2019. gada trijos čempionātos pēc kārtas somi spēlēja finālā un divas reizes ieguva titulu. Pasaules čempionātos Latvija tikai vienu reizi spējusi uzvarēt Somiju, bet zaudējusi astoņas reizes. It kā visi skaitļi runā par labu somiem, taču spēle ir spēle, un hokejā mēdz būt visādi. Pēdējos gados spēles ir spraigākas, kaut sākumā pret Somiju mums elites grupā parasti tiešām spēle nevedās. Latvija ļoti līdzīgi spēlēja pret somiem pārbaudes spēlē pirms pasaules čempionāta un arī uzvarēja pagarinājumā, tad gan neviena no šīm komandām nebija labākajā sastāvā. Somiem ir labi organizēta spēle ar vairākiem izciliem meistariem, taču arī viņu sastāvs nebūs optimālais, vairāki līderi vēl būs aizņemti cīņā par Stenlija kausu.

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu. Lielbritānija
programme.desc: Bens atgriežas Jorkšīras ieleju reģionā, lai apciemotu Ouenu ģimeni, kurā bez mammas Amandas un tēta Klaiva ir veseli deviņi bērni. Ģimene nodarbojas ar aitkopību, un viņiem pieder aitas, kuru priekšteces šajā reģionā ganījušās jau vairākus simtus gadu. Bens atklāj, ka, neraugoties uz nomaļo vietu, tik kupla ģimene darbojas kā neliela kopiena, kurā katram ir gan savi pienākumi, gan laiks izbaudīt apkārtējās dabas burvību.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Izmeklēšanu lietas krājas, un sestdienā iecirknī sastopama gandrīz visa komanda. Karls piedraud Šiasonam, lai liek mierā Riopelu. Vijoles zagļi prasa izpirkumu bitkoinos. Noelijai sāk šķist, ka viņas un Floransas izmeklētās nolaupīšanas lietas ir saistītas.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Dānija – Slovākija
programme.desc: Dānijas - Slovākijas spēles iznākums ir neparedzams, kaut arī kopumā daudz lielāki panākumi ir slovākiem. Toties dāņi pērn tika līdz pusfinālam, savukārt slovākiem aizvadītais turnīrs nemaz nebija tik veiksmīgs. Pasaules čempionātos abas komandas tikušās deviņas reizes, un septiņas no tām uzvarējuši slovāki.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā runāsim par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi pazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Ceturtdien Latvija spēlēja pret spēcīgo Somiju, vēl mūsu grupā - Šveice pret Lielbritāniju.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Kanāda – Norvēģija
programme.desc: Kanādiešiem ir tikai viens uzdevums - noskaņoties šai spēlei. Ja tas būs izdevies, tad norvēģiem izredžu maz. Jā, norvēģi arī ir fiziski labi, cīnās pie apmalēm un vārtu priekšā, taču Kanāda tik un tā šajos elementos ir pārāka, turklāt hokeja dzimtenes izlasē tomēr ir daudz vairāk individuāli meistarīgāku spēlētāju. Ja tas tik spilgti neizpaužas spēlē vienādos sastāvos, tad vairākumā pretiniekiem parasti ir lielas problēmas.

programme.title: Operācija Matrjoška. Krievijas slēptā fronte
programme.desc: Filma analizē Krievijas ietekmes stratēģiju Baltijā - no dezinformācijas līdz reāliem sabotāžas aktiem. Narvā, Rīgā un Viļņā atklājas dažādu kopienu spriedze un pretrunīgi priekšstati par vēsturi un tagadni. Aktuālāks kļūst jautājums, cik noturīga ir sabiedrība pret nemanāmu, bet sistemātisku ietekmi.

Raidījumu vada žurnālists Gundars Rēders.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Mākslīgais intelekts cilvēkam paver jaunas iespējas, bet vienlaicīgi paceļ arī eksistenciāli nozīmīgu risku likmes. Skolotājs Mikus Solovejs uzskata, ka patlaban ir izšķirošais laiks, lai pagūtu apjēgt mākslīgā intelekta pielietošanu skolās. Kā naivi bīstami optimistiski vērtējamas idejas, ka mākslīgais intelekts varētu kļūt ikvienam par individualizētu skolotāju. Sarunā ar raidījuma vadītāju Ilmāru Latkovski skolotājs Mikus Solovejs, vadoties no savas pieredzes, atklās tās kvalitātes, kurās mākslīgais intelekts nekādi nevarēs aizvietot skolotāju.

programme.title: Ceturtā studija

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Switzerland vs Great Britain
programme.desc: Šveice ir spēcīga un apņēmusies savās mājās pacīnīties par pasaules čempionu titulu. Neiespējami tas nav, jo komanda jau četras reizes spēlējusi finālā, no tām trīs - pavisam nesen. Var diezgan droši teikt, ka Šveicei nevajadzētu būt problēmām iekļūt labāko četru komandu skaitā grupā un tas nozīmē - ceturtdaļfinālā. Komanda ir ļoti stabila, taču tālāk ko prognozēt ir grūti, "play-off" spēlēs daudz var izšķirt nejaušība, tur zaudēt vairs nedrīkst, ja doma ir kļūt par čempioniem. Pasaules čempionātos Šveice divreiz ir spēlējusi ar britiem un abas reizes uzvarējusi.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā runāsim par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi pazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Ceturtdien Latvija spēlēja pret spēcīgo Somiju, vēl mūsu grupā - Šveice pret Lielbritāniju.

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu. Lielbritānija
programme.desc: Bens atgriežas Jorkšīras ieleju reģionā, lai apciemotu Ouenu ģimeni, kurā bez mammas Amandas un tēta Klaiva ir veseli deviņi bērni. Ģimene nodarbojas ar aitkopību, un viņiem pieder aitas, kuru priekšteces šajā reģionā ganījušās jau vairākus simtus gadu. Bens atklāj, ka, neraugoties uz nomaļo vietu, tik kupla ģimene darbojas kā neliela kopiena, kurā katram ir gan savi pienākumi, gan laiks izbaudīt apkārtējās dabas burvību.

programme.title: Ceturtā studija
programme.desc: Raidījuma "4. studija" misija ir palīdzēt risināt sabiedrībai aktuālus ikdienas jautājumus visās dzīves sfērās, kas ietekmē katra indivīda un sabiedrības dzīves kvalitāti. Raidījuma misija formulēta sauklī "Neērti jautājumi ērtākai ikdienai". Raidījums aktualizē problēmas, ar kurām saskaras ikviens Latvijas iedzīvotājs, sākot ar ģimeni, mācību un darba vidi, publisko telpu un beidzot ar dažādu privāto, pašvaldību un valsts iestāžu darbību un to sniegtajiem pakalpojumiem.

programme.title: Alpu dakteris
programme.desc: Nav labākas vietas, kur patverties no pilsētas kņadas, trokšņa un stresa, kā kalni. Bet dzīvot tur? Dzimto Alpu mazpilsētiņu, saucot tās gaisotni par smacējošu un aprobežotu, Mārtins pameta jau pirms daudziem gadiem, lai kļūtu par veiksmīgu ārstu kosmopolītiskajā lielpilsētā Ņujorkā. Nu viņš ir atgriezies. Uz pavisam īsu apciemojumu, lai atkal drīz atvadītos. Taču no likteņa neizbēgsi - atgriešanās mājās izrādās uz palikšanu. Jo pārāk liels ir trieciens, uzzinot, ka viņa pirmā mīlestība, kas pēc Mārtina aizbraukšanas apprecēja viņa paša brāli Hansu, ir mirusi. Taču atstājusi meitu, par kuras esamību Mārtins nekad pat nebija zinājis! Ar to izrādās pietiekami, lai izlemtu palikt Pēkšņi kļuvis par tēvu, Mārtins vēlas uzzināt vairāk par savu jauniegūto meitu Lili, iemantot viņas uzticēšanos. Tā dēļ viņš ir gatavs pat mēģināt sadarboties ar savu jaunāko brāli Hansu, kas joprojām jūt aizvainojumu. Hanss ir kļuvis par glābēju komandas vadītāju, un kopā ar Mārtinu viņi turpmāk neskaitāmas reizes riskēs ar savu dzīvību, lai glābtu kalnu negadījumu upurus vai kāpējus, ko pārsteigusi pēkšņa vētra. Mārtinu gaida atklāsme, ka bez saknēm nav iespējas turpināt dzīvi. Šeit viņš pilnībā aptvers arī to, ka būt par ārstu kalnos - tā nav tikai profesija, bet gan aicinājums. Kļūt par labu neatliekamās medicīniskās palīdzības sniedzēju kalnos iemācīties nevar, par tādu piedzimst. Un Mārtins Grūbers tāds neapšaubāmi ir!

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Sandra Medne no Jaunlutriņiem nekur pasaulē laimi meklēt nav gājusi. Pēc skolas beigšanas - kā sāka strādāt vietējā kultūras namā, tā pie kultūras arī palikusi, un lielākā viņas kaislība ir teātris. Vietējo amatieru teātri viņa vada jau divdesmit piecus gadus un godam spējusi to iznest cauri gadiem un juku laikiem lauku kultūrā. Reta ir tāda ģimene kā viņējā, kur teātri spēlējuši tēvs un onkulis, tagad spēlē vīrs Imants, meita Randa, dēli Māris un Modris un nu jau arī vedeklas. Bet ikdienā Sandra ir zemniece un saimniece savās senču mājās, kur audzē vistas, rūpējas par peoniju kolekciju, attīsta no vecmāmiņas gūtās zāļu gudrības vai uz pulksten diviem, kā parasts, gaida no lauka pusdienās vīru un dēlus. Teātra mēģinājumi jau gadu gadiem parasti ir astoņos vakarā. Pēc dienas darbiem.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Mākslīgais intelekts cilvēkam paver jaunas iespējas, bet vienlaicīgi paceļ arī eksistenciāli nozīmīgu risku likmes. Skolotājs Mikus Solovejs uzskata, ka patlaban ir izšķirošais laiks, lai pagūtu apjēgt mākslīgā intelekta pielietošanu skolās. Kā naivi bīstami optimistiski vērtējamas idejas, ka mākslīgais intelekts varētu kļūt ikvienam par individualizētu skolotāju. Sarunā ar raidījuma vadītāju Ilmāru Latkovski skolotājs Mikus Solovejs, vadoties no savas pieredzes, atklās tās kvalitātes, kurās mākslīgais intelekts nekādi nevarēs aizvietot skolotāju.

programme.title: Ķepa uz sirds
programme.desc: Informatīvi izklaidējošs raidījums visai ģimenei par dzīvnieku pareizu kopšanu un audzināšanu, speciālistu padomiem un ieteikumiem, kā arī dzīvnieku aizsardzības jautājumiem un daudzām citām aktuālām tēmām.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Pie stūres
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Hokejs. Pasaules čempionāts. Kanāda - Slovēnija
programme.desc: Kanādai - vēl viena spēle, kurā komanda ir izteikta favorīte. Parasti ir tā, ka vājākā komanda skatās, kāds ir spēles ritējums pret favorītiem. Ja neizdodas jau pats sākums un pretinieki iegūst vairāku vārtu pārsvaru, faktiski cīņa ir beigusies. Ja savukārt izdodas nosargāt savus vārtus ilgi neskartus, spēle var kļūt arī visai spraiga, jo negaidīti iegūts kaut viens punkts var lieti noderēt, lai saglabātu vietu elites grupā.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu. Lielbritānija
programme.desc: Bens dodas uz Pembrukšīru Velsā, lai vēlreiz satiktu Emmu Orbaku, kura pārcēlās turp jau pirms 20 gadiem. Emmas mērķis ir dzīvot, pēc iespējas mazāk iejaucoties Mātes Zemes dabiskajā kārtībā, - tas nozīmē, piemēram, būvēt ēkas no vietējiem, dabiskiem materiāliem un gādāt pašai savu iztiku. Pēdējos gados Emmai ir pievienojušies vēl vairāki cilvēki, un veidojas kopiena ar kopīgām garīgajām vērtībām.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Finland vs Great Britain
programme.desc: Somijas - Lielbritānijas spēlē jānotiek pārsteigumam, lai somi neuzvarētu pamatlaikā. Briti elites grupas čempionātos spēlējuši ne tik bieži, un visās trijās savstarpējās cīņās uzvarējuši somi, turklāt vēl nekad ziemeļnieki nav ielaiduši vārtus pret britiem, bijušas uzvaras ar 8 pret 0, 6 pret 0 un 5 pret 0.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā runāsim par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi pazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Piektdien bija četras spēles turnīrā, bet Latvijai šī bija brīvdiena. Mūsu grupā Vācija spēlēja pret Ungāriju un Somija - pret Lielbritāniju.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Germany vs Hungary
programme.desc: Vācieši ir favorīti, viņiem apakšgrupu beigās ir vairāki relatīvi vājāki pretinieki un labs laiks krāt punktus, lai tiktu ceturtdaļfinālā. Pasaules čempionātos abas komandas tikušās četras reizes, un vienmēr uzvarējuši vācieši. Pārliecinošākā uzvara ir 7 pret 2, taču vienreiz 2009. gada čempionātā Vācija uzvarēja tikai ar 2 pret 1.

programme.title: Ieslodzītā Nr.
programme.desc: Dokumentāla drāma, kas ataino aizkustinošo stāstu par Nāzanīnu Zāgarī-Retklifu un viņas vīru Ričardu Retklifu. Seriāls izgaismo Nāzanīnas nepamatoto ieslodzījumu Irānā un Ričarda neatlaidīgo cīņu par viņas atbrīvošanu – cīņu, kas sešu gadu garumā piesaistīja pasaules uzmanību. Filma atspoguļo notikumus no Irānas un Lielbritānijas dubultpilsones aizturēšanas lidostā līdz viņas atbrīvošanai un atgriešanās brīdim Apvienotajā Karalistē pēc sešiem gadiem. Personisks un emocionāli spēcīgs skatījums uz izturību, mīlestību un cīņu ar netaisnību.

programme.title: Pie stūres
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Kārtējais ceļojums zināšanu okeānā, kurā burātāji pierādīs gan prāta asumu, gan sacensības garu. Laiks doties erudīcijas viļņos, kur kuģu kapteiņi būs Silards Kamergrauzis un Valters Romans Silards Kamergrauzis - komandas kapteinis. Komersants, Latvijas Optimist klases asociācijas vadītājs, burā no 10 gadu vecuma. Jahtas "Spaniel" kapteinis, mīlošs tēvs meitām, no kurām divas burā, bet trešā mācās staigāt. Cilvēks, kas ar saviem jūras stāstiem liek medniekiem un makšķerniekiem nobālēt Rolands Millers - burātājs, burāšanas skolas vadītājs. Bijis profesionāls jūrnieks, tagad atpūtā. Strādājis Latvijas meklēšanas un glābšanas dienestā par glābšanas kuģa kapteini. Kapteinis uz jahtas "Milda" skaistajā un sarežģītajā ceļojumā apkārt pasaulei Gatis Graudums - burātājs trešajā paaudzē, burā no sešu gadu vecuma ar dažādām laivu klasēm, nodarbojas ar burāšanu vasarā un ziemā, ar labiem panākumiem piedalās dažādu klašu sacensībās. Kad nevar burāt, spēlē skvošu Valters Romans - komandas kapteinis. "GoRR" regates organizētājs. Augstā līmenī burājis jau bērnu un jauniešu sporta skolā, burāšanu iemīlēt palīdzējis tēvs un krusttēvs. Nodarbojies ar olimpisko burāšanas sportu, strādājis arī par treneri. Šobrīd cieņā ir jūras burāšana Gatis Gavars - arhitekts, kas sezonā Jūrmalas jahtklubā pavada tikpat daudz laika, cik arhitektu birojā. Vasarās jau 50 gadus burā kopā ar dvīņubrāli. Ziemā slēpo Gaiziņkalnā, Kaukāzā, Tatros un Alpos. Ar kapteini Valteru kopā dienējis sporta rotā, kopš tā laika tā ir stipra draudzība gan jūrā, gan uz zemes Rūdolfs Romans - komandas kapteiņa dēls, diplomēts būvinženieris, sertificēts būvuzraugs. Profesionāli nodarbojies ar hokeju, ir bijis Latvijas junioru čempions golfā U12 vecumā. Šobrīd paralēli darbam ir jahtu apmērīšanas sistēmas mērītājs Latvijā, strādājis par tiesnesi Eiropas un pasaules čempionātos jūras jahtām.

programme.desc: Sandra Medne no Jaunlutriņiem nekur pasaulē laimi meklēt nav gājusi. Pēc skolas beigšanas - kā sāka strādāt vietējā kultūras namā, tā pie kultūras arī palikusi, un lielākā viņas kaislība ir teātris. programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: Despite the claims of a famous work of fiction, never has a code been discovered in a painting by Leonardo Da Vinci. But new high resolution images of the Mona Lisa, taken to record its fading colours, may have revealed more than cracks in the varnish. One man believes he has found hidden numbers and letters. This episode follows the trail of a potential code…could it reveal the true meaning behind this enigmatic painting? Also in this episode, the world's oldest underground temple and discovered with up to 7,000 skeletons.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP discovers four kilograms of cocaine concealed within two cakes, and then HSI follows the case from Miami to Atlanta to dismantle an interstate smuggling ring. CBP Miami inspects a load of in-transit mail and uncovers two suspicious packages - a drum and machine part - that may contain narcotics. CBP New York cracks-down on the importation of illicit money, and investigates multiple travelers attempting to bring-in large sums of undeclared cash.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes another crack at backcountry bridge building, but this time she's determined to use the Yukon's harsh conditions to her advantage. Resolved to thrive in the Northwoods, Billy tries his hand at building a blacksmith's forge. Emilie and Gilbert make the most of the frigid temperatures and begin work on a summertime necessity. Locked in the depths of a Newfoundland winter, Matty takes to the sea in search of a new supply of firewood.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot, caught off guard by an unplanned litter of puppies, prepares to leave her Yukon trapline early. In need of metal for his new forge, Billy embarks on a backwoods salvage mission. With their supply of meat running low, Emilie and Gilbert hit the trail for a late-season caribou hunt, and in an effort to embrace his new island lifestyle to the fullest, Matty takes to sea and tries his hand at scallop fishing.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A small commuter plane begins a short flight when disaster strikes. Moments after takeoff, the nose of the aircraft pitches up dramatically. The flight crew struggles for control. The plane is just 350 meters in the air when it stalls, rolls to the left, and plummets to the ground. It slams into a packed hangar, killing everyone on board. Combing through the wreckage, investigators find a single clue that leads them to uncover a string of errors and faulty assumptions that have been putting millions of passengers at risk for years.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Engineering Europe: Compilations
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey across Europe to uncover several extraordinary feats of engineering and innovation. Stunning visuals and expert interviews take you from Denmark's Storstrøm Bridge — a symbol of resilience and connectivity — to the enchanting Dutch Castle de Haar and the avant-garde Hotel Marques de Riscal in Rioja, Spain. Experience the complex ingenuity of the Friesen Rail Bridge in Germany, then venture beneath London to reveal how the mighty "Super Sewer" is transforming urban life. Witness the Dutch Delta Works defending millions from the sea and explore the enduring craftsmanship of the Royal Bodewes shipyard. Through stories and conversations with engineers, discover how relentless ingenuity has shaped these iconic landmarks, forever redefining what's possible across Europe.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: What makes a car worth a million Euros? The answer for Horacio Pagani is a super car that perfectly blends art and engineering, that has unsurpassed power, performance and luxury, the finest possible raw materials and in which every single one of its 4700 components will be recognised as a work of art. This film tells the story of Pagani's successor to his world famous Zonda. It follows the creation of the Pagani Huayra from the start of its secret design and development eight years ago through a testing programme that has exceeded one million kilometres… to its launch in Geneva in 2011 and to the production of the very first customer cars. We'll meet the dedicated Pagani craftsmen who share Horacio's love of detail and the starstruck suppliers who have gone to extraordinary lengths to win his business and produce parts for the Huayra that meet his breathtakingly high standards. Most of all we'll enter the world and imagination of Pagani himself - an engaging, passionate genius who is entrenched in a pursuit of perfection so relentless, there's a very real danger this car may never be finished.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: Ultimate Factories also known as Megafactories is an American documentary television series that premiered in 2006 on the National Geographic Channel. The program explores the inner workings of factories worldwide. Each episode profiles the machinery and manpower behind each factory's main product, featuring close-ups, breakdowns, interviews, and side stories to show the sequence of events to produce the product in the factory. Hoff Productions was one of the principal producers of this highly successful series. It also airs in non-US markets as Megafactories.

programme.title: Building the Channel Tunnel
programme.desc: The Channel Tunnel linking Britain with France is one of the seven wonders of the modern world but what did it take to build the longest undersea tunnel ever constructed? We hear from the men and women, who built this engineering marvel. Massive tunnel boring machines gnawed their way through rock and chalk, digging not one tunnel but three; two rail tunnels and a service tunnel. This was a project that would be privately financed; not a penny of public money would be spent on the tunnel. Business would have to put up all the money and take all the risks. This was also a project that was blighted by flood, fire, tragic loss of life and financial bust ups. Today, it stands as an engineering triumph and a testament to what can be achieved when two nations, Britain and France put aside their historic differences and work together.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery on an island near Antarctica point to brief human settlements. Disturbing noises heard by foreign diplomats in Cuba set off research on a possible global psychological phenomenon. Mysterious rubber-like slabs from Indonesia appear on European beaches. A strange stone pattern found in the waters of Florida's Dry Tortugas National Park reveals a long-lost island.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: An abandoned Cold War-era Russian military base is explored, and a palatial mansion is found decaying on Isla Grande off the Colombian coast. In the waters off of Japan's Yonaguni Island, a stone structure is discovered on the seafloor. Evidence of a turbulent past is unearthed on Italy's volcanic Stromboli Island.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP Nogales stops a pedestrian carrying fentanyl internally and seizes a vehicle with a mixed load of heroin and fentanyl with a combined street value of over $760,000. In San Diego, CBP officers empty a gas tank filled with 35 packages of meth, all tied together for quick retrieval. Spring breakers return to Atlanta's airport with varying contraband, including $38,000 of undeclared cash inside a bag of dirty laundry.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: On the west coast of Puerto Rico, Air and Marine Operations chase down and arrest smugglers caught tossing bales of cocaine overboard. At the Fort Lauderdale Airport, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seizes over a thousand hydrocodone pills from an airline pilot returning from Colombia. At Atlanta International Airport, CBP consults with archaeologists to verify the authenticity of several artifacts they suspect were looted.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Homeland Security Investigations in Puerto Rico seized cocaine from an abandoned boat on the beach. In Texas, Customs and Border Protection officers uncovered packages of methamphetamine hidden within pallets from a large shipment of limes. With the drug pouches stuck to the wood, it takes them many hours to retrieve the load. At the Port of Newark, CBP discovers stolen vehicles concealed inside shipping containers about to be sent out of the country.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Minutes before the noise curfew, a privately chartered Gulfstream III is on final approach to Aspen, Colorado amid heavy snow. And though the plane directly ahead aborts its landing due to poor visibility, AvJet N303GA emerges from the clouds, tries to line up with the single runway, and crashes—instantly claiming the lives of all 18 people on board. With no signs of mechanical failure, investigators learn the plane dropped well below minimum altitude on approach. And though a deep dive into the pilots' backgrounds reveals no red flags, the plane's wreckless trajectory begins to make sense when they look into what happened before the late takeoff from Los Angeles. Client pressure blurred the lines between safety and customer satisfaction. And as a result, the confused pilots were determined to land the plane at Aspen—in spite of the risks. Final

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In California's Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft designed for sub-orbital flight. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earth's atmosphere, approaching the speed of sound, it breaks apart and falls from the sky. With the future of commercial space travel hanging in the balance, it's up to investigators to figure out what went wrong.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: Mary Magdalene has long been known as a repentant sinner, a saint, and perhaps most importantly, the witness to the resurrection. But author Margaret Starbird believes that she was also Jesus' wife, mother of his child and victim of the biggest conspiracy in history. In this television exclusive she examines what some have claimed could be one of the earliest Christian artefacts ever discovered and untangles a riddle that she believes reveals the truth about this mysterious woman from the bible.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: The ancient Incas ruled over most of South America 500 years ago. Their empire spanned the continent with roads, temples and mysterious cities built to incredible precision. Amazingly they achieved it all without a written language. Archaeologists today believe they may have discovered how this ancient civilization communicated. And it could be a three dimensional language - made from knots. Anthropologist Dr Sabine Hyland attempts to decode the sacred knotted relics known as khipus, and crack the intricate code of the Incas. Also in this episode the Vikings. They were a feared race of seafaring warriors, with powers of navigation far ahead of their time. They discovered America almost 500 years before Columbus. But how did they cross vast oceans to raid, trade and plunder? What was their secret?

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: January 1991, The Gulf War. Eight SAS commandos are dropped off 140 miles behind enemy lines in Iraq. Their mission is to spy on a main supply route carrying Saddam Hussein's mobile SCUD missile launchers across the Iraq desert. But the mission goes disastrously wrong. Only one would escape the enemy and make it out of Iraq alive…

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: October 1993. Keni Thomas and Randy Ramaglia are among a squad of US Rangers and Delta Force who rope down from Black Hawk helicopters into the capital of war-ravaged Somalia. Their mission: to capture two top lieutenants of rebel leader Mohamed Aidid. But the daring raid goes disastrously wrong when Black Hawk Super 6-1 is shot down over the city. The ground troops are sent to secure the crash sites but they are outgunned and overrun, sustaining multiple casualties. When Super 6-4 pilot Mike Durant flies in to help, his Black hawk is shot down too. His crew dead, he is captured and held for 11 days. The infamous Battle of Mogadishu sees 18 Americans dead and 73 injured.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Homeland Security Investigations in Puerto Rico seized cocaine from an abandoned boat on the beach. In Texas, Customs and Border Protection officers uncovered packages of methamphetamine hidden within pallets from a large shipment of limes. With the drug pouches stuck to the wood, it takes them many hours to retrieve the load. At the Port of Newark, CBP discovers stolen vehicles concealed inside shipping containers about to be sent out of the country.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI Miami investigates two separate maritime smuggling cases, and seizes more than 450 kilograms of cocaine off of a yacht bringing-in drugs from the Caribbean. CBP cracks down on the illegal importation of prescription medications, due to concern's for people's health and safety. And HSI New York arrests a cocaine courier fromCuracao, as part of a two-year investigation into a large-scale drug smuggling organization. APPROVEDLine Description: HSI pursues multiple cases of cocaine smuggled from the Caribbean aboard boats. CBP makes large-scale seizures of medications without aprescription.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes a break from the rigors of the trapline and gets busy preparing for another summer hunting season, horseback- style. Matty "forges" ahead with another big backwoods project and takes on some even bigger life changes. Billy attempts to rehabilitate a forgotten old friend to help him embark on a new adventure, and, despite a recent dump of spring snow, Emilie and Gilbert lay the groundwork for a little bit of backcountry luxury.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: With warmer weather just around the corner, Margot and Alex hit the trail to begin their summer horse guiding season. Billy gives his newly refurbished boat the ultimate sea-worthiness test on the mighty St. Lawrence River. Matty and Kelly take another step toward complete self-sufficiency with the addition of some "ovine" friends, and despite late-season snow, Emilie and Gilbert redouble their efforts to complete a family-friendly hunting camp.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Was the tragedy of the space shuttle Columbia baked into the original design? A wave of ship strikes has China's bridge builders working overtime. Temporary stages are easy to put up and easy to take down, but sometimes they come down at the wrong time: suddenly and all at once. Check out hotels that tumble; take a tour of some of the world's most expensive and useless airports, and learn why a Shanghai apartment tower dropped like a slab.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Disasters can strike anywhere, anytime. To find out why, expert analysis of the available evidence is used to recreate real world disasters in cutting edge 3D graphics. We can dissect them, peel back the layers, even freeze time to reveal a disaster's hidden and surprising causes – a paperwork error, a bad glue job, changing a restaurant opening hours. Whatever it is, Disaster Autopsy will uncover it.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Disasters can strike anywhere, anytime. To find out why, expert analysis of the available evidence is used to recreate real world disasters in cutting edge 3D graphics. We can dissect them, peel back the layers, even freeze time to reveal a disaster's hidden and surprising causes – a paperwork error, a bad glue job, changing a restaurant opening hours. Whatever it is, Disaster Autopsy will uncover it.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: World War II: Secrets From Above
programme.desc: Autumn 1942: German and Italian tanks roll into British-controlled Egypt in a bid to capture the vital Allied supply route through the Suez Canal. As the British retreat to the desert bottleneck of El Alamein, Hitler's star general, Erwin Rommel, plans an all-out tank attack. In a battle of machines and armour, British commanders must rely on stealth and cunning to outwit the famous 'Desert Fox'.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI Miami investigates two separate maritime smuggling cases, and seizes more than 450 kilograms of cocaine off of a yacht bringing-in drugs from the Caribbean. CBP cracks down on the illegal importation of prescription medications, due to concern's for people's health and safety. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Primal Survivor: Over the Andes
programme.desc: On the fifth leg of his epic journey across South America, wilderness explorer Hazen Audel tackles the deadly Atacama Desert. Braving crumbling cliffs, boiling volcanic springs, and miles of waterless wasteland, Hazen follows the sun west to the pasturelands of the Lickanantay. Here he joins these traditional herders in a llama-drive to make it in time for the once yearly Floramiento Festival.

programme.title: Primal Survivor: Over the Andes
programme.desc: On the final leg of his gruelling expedition across South America, wilderness explorer Hazen Audel faces the perils of the brutal Pacific Coast. After battling his way over rocky peninsulas and towering sand dunes, Hazen braves the might of the ocean in a salvaged boat before climbing to the top of Mount Moreno in time for the Winter Solstice sunrise.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: While hunting for evidence in a possible case of poaching, conservation officer Logan encounters a potentially life-threatening situation with two aggressive bears feeding on the remains of a moose. In Whitehorse, wildfire season is fast approaching, and the Yukon First Nations Wildfire is prepping for its busiest year ever. Then, a young group of recruits is pushed to their physical limits chasing their firefighting dreams when an out-of-control wildfire closes in on Whitehorse. Meanwhile, on a lonely stretch of highway far from town, Ray and Doug struggle to help when a driver falls asleep at the wheel and ends up hopelessly tangled in the trees.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to Boise, Idaho, Continental Airlines Flight 1713 is delayed on the tarmac in Denver where controllers struggle to keep departures on schedule amid heavy snow. When the plane is finally cleared for take-off, the DC-9 barely lifts off the ground before its banks sharply and crashes. Investigators find nothing wrong with the aircraft itself, but what they eventually uncover changes commercial flight forever.

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: Throughout history, men and women have dedicated themselves to raking in as much wealth as possible; old money, new money, even blood money. But from Robber Barons to Mansa Musa of Mali; how did they get it and how did they spend it? And in the end, were they happier than the rest of us?

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: Love has always been one of the great drivers of history - a drunk driver, without a licence. Yet love hurtles on, costing royalty their heads, generals their victories, and many of us our sanity. We explore why, from Liz Taylor to Attila the Hun; the pain is never enough to stop us looking for love.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: On the eve of the 125th anniversary of the Dawson City Fire Department, Chief Mike and his volunteer firefighters face two emergencies that push their limits. A young boy's mountain biking adventure takes a horrific turn, leaving him with fractured bones. Just outside of town, a vehicle goes off the road and flips several times as it plummets down a steep ravine, stopping just inches from contaminating a sensitive marshland. With no one else to help, Chief Mike needs to find a way to recover the vehicle. Near Carmacks, conservation officer Blake's advanced firearms training is put to the test when he's sent in to protect a group of researchers stalked by an aggressive bear in the thick brush.

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller
programme.desc: Mariana goes inside the adrenaline-fueled subculture of illegal street racing that's wreaking havoc on cities worldwide. From late-night races in the Bronx to deadly motorbike showdowns in the Dominican Republic, she investigates the black-market gambling that fuels these events, why young men are so willing to risk their lives for speed, and what law enforcement is doing to prevent more deaths. Final

programme.title: Trafficked with Mariana van Zeller
programme.desc: An estimated 100 million sharks are killed worldwide each year — the majority to satisfy an insatiable demand for shark fin soup. Mariana goes undercover to explore how American consumers are an increasing part of the problem and investigates the shark hunters and smugglers making so much money that the Mexican cartels now want in on the trade.

programme.title: Mutant Weather
programme.desc: Mutant Weather takes viewers onto the front line of the shocking new weather phenomena that, thanks to climate change, are changing the world around us faster than we can keep up: terrifying elemental events with names like Dry Lightning, Thundersnow, Polar Vortexes, Firenadoes, Ice Waves and Atmospheric Rivers. Mutant Weather tells the stories of these mutations, from gestation and birth to their cataclysmic impact and how they will evolve next, using spectacular video footage, first-hand testimonies from those who've experienced them, expert scientific analysis, stunning graphics and dramatic recreations.

programme.title: Mutant Weather
programme.desc: Mutant Weather takes viewers onto the front line of the shocking new weather phenomena that, thanks to climate change, are changing the world around us faster than we can keep up: terrifying elemental events with names like Dry Lightning, Thundersnow, Polar Vortexes, Firenadoes, Ice Waves and Atmospheric Rivers. programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI Miami investigates two separate maritime smuggling cases, and seizes more than 450 kilograms of cocaine off of a yacht bringing-in drugs from the Caribbean. CBP cracks down on the illegal importation of prescription medications, due to concern's for people's health and safety. And HSI New York arrests a cocaine courier fromCuracao, as part of a two-year investigation into a large-scale drug smuggling organization. APPROVEDLine Description: HSI pursues multiple cases of cocaine smuggled from the Caribbean aboard boats. CBP makes large-scale seizures of medications without aprescription.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: Hazen Audel, survival instructor and wilderness guide, travels to the most extreme places on earth to take on solo challenges that will push him to the limit of his knowledge, endurance and skills. Battling dense Guyana jungle, parched Kenyan plains and an active volcano in the Pacific Vanuatu islands. To succeed, he will rely on the ancient techniques of indigenous people who have lived in these environments for thousands of years.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: (DESERT WARRIORS) Hazen returns to the Rendille tribal village where he learned their camel nomad skills and sets out to collect one from the herdsmen camping out way in the Kenyan desert. He avoids creepy critters like the camel spider and snakes, find someone beat him at harvesting honey from wild bees and digs for water. He crosses crocodile-infested Lake Turkana in a canoe. Having passed a strange stones site, he finds the herdsmen not at the corral he expected and much join them elsewhere, then camps with them, fearing scorpions and lions after the animals. He manages to return with one camel, enough for a hungry village to feast on.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to Boise, Idaho, Continental Airlines Flight 1713 is delayed on the tarmac in Denver where controllers struggle to keep departures on schedule amid heavy snow. When the plane is finally cleared for take-off, the DC-9 barely lifts off the ground before its banks sharply and crashes. Investigators find nothing wrong with the aircraft itself, but what they eventually uncover changes commercial flight forever.

programme.title: Science of Stupid

programme.title: Ultimate Predators
programme.desc: Join us in our exploration of four of nature's deadliest animals: vipers, crocodiles, bears and sharks. Let's find out how they kill, what their abilities are and which one of them is the most deserving of the title - the ultimate predator.

programme.title: India's Wild Leopards
programme.desc: India may be the land of the Tiger, but it is also home to masters of stealth that prowl the deepest of jungles and the highest of mountains. Journey to Ladakh in the Himalaya in search of Snow Leopards - the ghost of the mountains. Then venture into the realm of the smallest of big cats - the Clouded Leopard in the jungles of north east India. Wildlife Cameraman and National Geographic Fellow, Sandesh Kadur is on a mission to uncover their secretive lives.

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continent's most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Built for the Kill
programme.desc: Discover some of the most dangerous and deadly animal species on the planet, from big cats to tiny insects. These creatures developed amazing skills to survive and kill their pray in unique ways. Some of them use poison as their main weapon, while others are incredibly fast or camouflage well in order to catch their victims.

programme.title: Built for the Kill
programme.desc: Discover some of the most dangerous and deadly animal species on the planet, from big cats to tiny insects. These creatures developed amazing skills to survive and kill their pray in unique ways. Some of them use poison as their main weapon, while others are incredibly fast or camouflage well in order to catch their victims.

programme.title: Built for the Kill
programme.desc: Discover some of the most dangerous and deadly animal species on the planet, from big cats to tiny insects. These creatures developed amazing skills to survive and kill their pray in unique ways. Some of them use poison as their main weapon, while others are incredibly fast or camouflage well in order to catch their victims.

programme.title: Ultimate Rivals: Cats vs Dogs
programme.desc: Canines and felines have been living side by side in Africa for hundreds of thousands of years, and they've never really gotten along-not even amongst themselves. Throw the hyena into the mix and they're all nightmare neighbors? Stealing from each other; harassing each other; eating each other's young. Avoidance might be the only way to stay alive. Cats, dogs and the wild-card hyena, all jousting in a free for all for survival.

programme.title: Built for the Kill
programme.desc: Discover some of the most dangerous and deadly animal species on the planet, from big cats to tiny insects. programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Catching the world's deadliest snakes is no problem for Simon Keys and his partner Siouxsie Gillett, who round up Durban's ever-growing population of street snakes. With the summer heat enticing the snakes into the city, it's the duo's job to safely catch the slithering creatures and release them safely back into the wild. Entering homes, offices and even factories, the reclusive reptiles seek to find shelter in places you wouldn't think likely. From black mambas to cobras, Simon and Siouxsie have their work cut out as they race to help the residents of Durban stay safe from a potentially lethal snakebite.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australia's incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the ocean's depths and uses science to identify Australia's ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Documentary series featuring fearsome fights between the biggest and the baddest animals on planet. Watch the animals fighting for their food, territory, rights and life. Follow the drama and adrenaline of the toughest and fearcest fights in savannah, jungles and water. It is an ultimate survival with no rules whatsoever. Uncover the extraordinary motivations and strategies used by the animal world.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Life in the African bush is a constant struggle for survival. When babies are born, mothers show incredible courage to protect them from danger.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Big Cats V Prey. From elephants charging with lions clinging to their tusks, to turf wars between male leopards and hyenas driving a lion off his own buffalo kill, this epic safari reveals raw nature at its fiercest.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Orcas are the rulers of the seas. These majestic marine mammals have captured the hearts of people with their intelligence and complex family structures. However, since killer whales started attacking boats near Gibraltar, many are asking: Are they threatening us or just playing? The central revelation is that orcas, with specialized "cultures," perfectly exploit the richness of the seas. Surprisingly, there are different orca cultures around the globe. This episode also showcases impressive images of how the curious whales create genuine "fashions," and meet for mating. Their family groups are led by experienced matriarchs who maintain lifelong bonds with their offspring, particularly their sons. Singer and orca enthusiast Sarah Connor lends her voice to the documentary, giving the orcas' stories a special depth.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australia's incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the ocean's depths and uses science to identify Australia's ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australia's incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the ocean's depths and uses science to identify Australia's ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Perfect Predator
programme.desc: From their massive size, strength and stamina to their finely tuned hunting skills and unrelenting will to survive—sharks have evolved to be the perfect predator. But how do they do it? In this action-packed hour, unlock key evolutionary components that have kept these apex predators on top for millions of years.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: Whether searching for prey in the tropical canopy or stalking a meal over a spongy moss carpet, forest predators rely on stealth-like skills to survive. Natural instincts kick in right from birth, and in one never-before-seen case, even before birth. For the first time captured on camera, watch glass frog embryos hatch early to escape a little-known but lethal wasp, while their father fiercely defends the babies with his martial arts moves.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: There are still places on Earth where fields of grass stretch as far as the eye can see. In order to survive in these open spaces, predators must hide in plain sight. On the vast plains of the African savanna, banded mongooses rely on strength in numbers in order to succeed in a land of giants. Cheetahs and secretary birds must conquer extreme heat and elusive prey, risking their lives to feed their offspring. Mongolian wolves hunt for scarce food on the steppe.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: Secret Life of Predators is a National Geography documentary series narrated by Boone Smith, exploring animals that are on the top of the food chains in the environments they inhabit, such as eagles, tigers and bears. Meet some of the deadliest creatures, from rainforests and African savannas to the depths of the ocean. Find out the strategies these animals use to fight for their survival, and why are these hunter species the most successful when it comes to it.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Orcas are the rulers of the seas. These majestic marine mammals have captured the hearts of people with their intelligence and complex family structures. However, since killer whales started attacking boats near Gibraltar, many are asking: Are they threatening us or just playing? The central revelation is that orcas, with specialized "cultures," perfectly exploit the richness of the seas. Surprisingly, there are different orca cultures around the globe. This episode also showcases impressive images of how the curious whales create genuine "fashions," and meet for mating. Their family groups are led by experienced matriarchs who maintain lifelong bonds with their offspring, particularly their sons. Singer and orca enthusiast Sarah Connor lends her voice to the documentary, giving the orcas' stories a special depth.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: A central theme of this episode is the remarkable learning behavior of orcas, passed on from generation to generation. As marine biologist and wildlife filmmaker Florian Graner explores the mysteries of orcas, viewers immerse themselves in the different cultures of the orca populations in the Salish Sea. Singer and orca enthusiast Sarah Connor lends the documentary a special depth with her narration and takes viewers on a journey into the world of the largest members of the dolphin family. The documentary sheds light on the fascinating world of the black-and-white giants of the seas, their intelligence, complex social structures, and their impressive ability to pass on knowledge from generation to generation.

programme.title: Deep Sea Dwellers
programme.desc: Movie special-effect gurus are forever trying to invent more compelling creatures from other planets, hoping to terrorize our imaginations. To do this, they often draw from the natural world, and few creatures fit the bill more than the cephalopods: shapeshifters, with three hearts, blue blood and holes in their brains. But while they might look like creatures from another galaxy, these aliens have called Earth home for hundreds of millions of years. In our quest to find intelligent life, we search among the stars, but perhaps we should be looking closer to home. The octopus, squid and cuttlefish are some of the most intelligent creatures in the animal kingdom. They have colonized all of the world's oceans and are widespread in even the darkest corners of the abyss. So, forget Hollywood; there are aliens in the deep.

programme.title: Sharks of the North
programme.desc: Sightings of great white sharks have been on the rise in Atlantic Canada. Alanna Canaran, a passionate science educator and dive instructor, embarks on a mission to unravel the enigmas surrounding these magnificent creatures and is determined to dispel fear of sharks in Nova Scotians. As the journey unfolds, Canaran and her team dive into the history of human-shark relationships along the coast. Facing numerous challenges, including elusive sharks and treacherous weather conditions, the team perseveres. With sheer determination and a stroke of luck, they gather invaluable knowledge of these magnificent creatures, contributing to a better understanding of white sharks in Canada.

programme.title: Perfect Predator
programme.desc: From their massive size, strength and stamina to their finely tuned hunting skills and unrelenting will to survive—sharks have evolved to be the perfect predator. But how do they do it? In this action-packed hour, unlock key evolutionary components that have kept these apex predators on top for millions of years.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: Part 1 of our series starts with the dust of the disappearing migration as it heads off across the river and leaves. Behind them, hundreds if not thousands of other animals cannot move, or won't move, because they are locked into territories, invisible barriers that say to them, 'leave your bubble at your peril'. This is their story. It is the story about what happens between September and the following July. Nine months of wildebeest-free Mara.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: Part 2 sets the scene, now the zebras wander off, a striped echo of part one. If the first episode is dusted in browns and yellows, this is green as the landscape changes and the rain turn again, rising rivers, making it difficult for everyone again, flooding, rushing waters in a raging torrent. Paradise it may be, but it is a harsh paradise. As the rains clear, we catch up with another character introduced in the first episode, our serval mother that had her den flooded; but she reveals that she has survived. And so has her cub - a miracle under these circumstances.

programme.title: Perfect Predator
programme.desc: From their massive size, strength and stamina to their finely tuned hunting skills and unrelenting will to survive—sharks have evolved to be the perfect predator. programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: Whether searching for prey in the tropical canopy or stalking a meal over a spongy moss carpet, forest predators rely on stealth-like skills to survive. Natural instincts kick in right from birth, and in one never-before-seen case, even before birth. For the first time captured on camera, watch glass frog embryos hatch early to escape a little-known but lethal wasp, while their father fiercely defends the babies with his martial arts moves.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pārklāj māju ar burvju produktu, lai novērstu ūdens sūci. Nākamajā dienā māja saplok kā balons. Putns uzvij ligzdu uz Barbazū vēdera. Barbazū grib kļūt par lieu koku, lai sniegtu patvērumu dzīvniekiem. Situācija kļūst sarežģīta.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais uzbūvē māju kokā. Barbamamma ir apņēmusies novērst piesārņojumu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala saņem paciņu ar rozā zvēriņiem, ko nosauc par Skvīkijiem. Barbabravo, Barbalala un Barbabo ir apnicis, ka brāļi un māsas par viņiem smejas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Rīt būs barbabērnu pirmā skolas diena.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad komanda uzbūvē īpašu limonādes stendu Lūkasam un Lilija, īgnais Ātrmeistars ieripina to Celtnieklīča ielās. Kāpēc bebrs Krančijs šķērso ceļu? Jo Rabla komanda būvē tiltu, lai palīdzētu viņam nokļūt ceļa otrā pusē.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīci ir pārņēmis noslēpums. Kad pēkšņi pazūd pilsētnieku skulptūra, Rabla komandai pievienojas Čeiss, lai atrisinātu pazudušās statujas noslēpumu... un uzbūvētu gluži jaunu Zinātnes centru, lai palīdzētu izmeklēt.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: Ķepu patruļa ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā,

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
